stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct regarding an unbalanced field with a range of V1 speeds?

options.a: An increase in the selected V<sub>1</sub> decreases the all-engine and one-engine-out take-off distance.
options.b: A reduction in the selected V<sub>1</sub> increases the acceleration-stop distance.
options.c: If the selected V<sub>1</sub> is increased, the all-engine take-off distance remains unaffected.
options.d: The selected V<sub>1</sub> must be equal to, or greater than, the balanced V<sub>1</sub> speed.
